name: Case Study
history: Master's degree in engineering and experience in robotics. Past remorse related to not dedicating enough time to a project.
intermediate_belief: I must be successful to be valued.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I fail, I am worthless.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of conflict and difficult situations.
situation: Considering launching a micro press and changing careers. Feeling uncertain about financial stability and fulfillment while comparing self to peers.
auto_thought: I might fail and not be able to support myself.
behavior: Avoidance of making a decision about career change.
